message:
fix(codegen): Use ArrayListUnmanaged for Zig 0.15 compatibility

In Zig 0.15, std.ArrayList no longer supports empty {} initialization.
Migrated to std.ArrayListUnmanaged across codegen modules:

- builtins/collections.zig: enumerate, zip, map, filter, reversed
- collections_mod.zig: deque, defaultdict operations
- itertools_mod.zig: chain, product, permutations, combinations
- comprehensions.zig: list/set/dict comprehensions
- try_except.zig: exception handling buffers
- methods/*.zig: string, dict, set, file operations
- runtime/builtins.zig: bytesRepr, tupleRepr, print functions

ArrayListUnmanaged requires passing allocator to each operation but
supports the {} empty initialization pattern needed throughout codegen.
